root_text.an4.202:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco assaddho hoti, ahiriko hoti, anottappī hoti, appassuto hoti, kusīto hoti, muṭṭhassati hoti, duppañño hoti.
root_text.an4.202:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca assaddho hoti, parañca assaddhiye samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:3.3: attanā ca ahiriko hoti, parañca ahirikatāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:3.4: attanā ca anottappī hoti, parañca anottappe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:3.5: attanā ca appassuto hoti, parañca appassute samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:3.6: attanā ca kusīto hoti, parañca kosajje samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:3.7: attanā ca muṭṭhassati hoti, parañca muṭṭhassacce samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:3.8: attanā ca duppañño hoti, parañca duppaññatāya samādapeti.
root_text.an4.202:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco saddho hoti, hirimā hoti, ottappī hoti, bahussuto hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, satimā hoti, paññavā hoti.
root_text.an4.202:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca saddhāsampanno hoti, parañca saddhāsampadāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:5.3: attanā ca hirimā hoti, parañca hirimatāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:5.4: attanā ca ottappī hoti, parañca ottappe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:5.5: attanā ca bahussuto hoti, parañca bāhusacce samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:5.6: attanā ca āraddhavīriyo hoti, parañca vīriyārambhe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:5.7: attanā ca upaṭṭhitassati hoti, parañca satiupaṭṭhāne samādapeti;
root_text.an4.202:5.8: attanā ca paññāsampanno hoti, parañca paññāsampadāya samādapeti.

translation_text.an4.202:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.an4.202:1.2: a true person and an even truer person.
translation_text.an4.202:2.1: And what is an untrue person?
translation_text.an4.202:2.2: It’s someone who is faithless, shameless, imprudent, with little learning, lazy, unmindful, and witless.
translation_text.an4.202:2.3: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.an4.202:3.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.an4.202:3.2: It’s someone who is faithless, shameless, imprudent, with little learning, lazy, confused, and witless. And they encourage others in these same qualities.
translation_text.an4.202:3.9: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.an4.202:4.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.an4.202:4.2: It’s someone who is faithful, conscientious, prudent, learned, energetic, mindful, and wise.
translation_text.an4.202:4.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.an4.202:5.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.an4.202:5.2: It’s someone who is personally accomplished in faith, conscience, prudence, learning, energy, mindfulness, and wisdom. And they encourage others in these same qualities.
translation_text.an4.202:5.9: This is called an even truer person.”
